projects.title: BlotzTask
projects.description: A productivity app designed for people with ADHD — helping users break tasks into manageable steps and stay on track.

memphisCards.title: AI Task Generation
memphisCards.description: Speak or write anything — BlotzTask breaks it down into actionable tasks automatically.

memphisCards.title: AI Task Breakdown
memphisCards.description: Use AI to break complex tasks into simple, manageable steps.

memphisCards.title: Deadline
memphisCards.description: Set important tasks as deadlines so urgent work stays visible and on track.

memphisCards.title: Gacha Machine
memphisCards.description: When you do not know what to do next, spin the gacha machine to get something you can work on.

memphisCards.title: Real-time Sync
memphisCards.description: Stay in sync with your team — tasks update instantly across all devices.

memphisCards.title: Smart Reminders
memphisCards.description: Never miss a deadline — BlotzTask nudges you at just the right moment.
